caption: Graph Discovery
description: Graph Discovery events capture a graph representation of entities and their relationships. Nodes are typed via entity_type_id and edges are typed via relation_id, enabling consumers to filter domain-specific views (identity, topology, temporal, data lineage, dependency) from a single graph.
name: graph_discovery

1.caption: Log
1.description: The graph data is captured via a log.

2.caption: Collect
2.description: The graph data is captured via a collection process.

3.caption: Query
3.description: The graph data is captured via a query.

event_graph.description: The graph representation of entities and relationships discovered or collected. Filter by entity_type_id and relation_id to extract domain-specific views.
